summary: Backend Stripe checkout flow verified end-to-end via curl with real stripe.com session URLs. Frontend partially verified: login + add-to-cart works. Cart sheet 'Pay & Place Order' click was indirectly confirmed via stripe redirect navigation behavior, but exact UI selector flow could not be fully scripted within retry budget (the cart trigger is an icon-only button in the header without a data-testid).
passed: POST /api/auth/login admin & test users -> 200 with JWT
GET /api/foods returns seed data incl. Etani Signature Latte ($4.50)
POST /api/orders creates order with payment_status='unpaid' (total 4.5*3 = 13.5 verified)
POST /api/checkout/session 403 when another user attempts to pay someone else's order ('Not your order')
GET /api/checkout/status/{session_id} returns payment_status='unpaid', status='open', amount_total=13.5, currency='usd' (matches order total) and does NOT flip order to paid
GET /api/checkout/status/{session_id} 403 for another user ('Not your session')
GET /api/orders/mine still shows payment_status='unpaid' after status poll (idempotency preserved)
Frontend loads, JWT-injected session shows 'Welcome back, Stripe'
Menu loads, View & Order dialog opens, Add to Order shows '1 x Etani Signature Latte added' toast
action_items: Optional: add data-testid='open-cart-button' to the bag icon in Navbar and data-testid='place-order-button' to the Pay & Place Order CTA in CartSheet to make automated E2E flows reliable
Optional: add data-testid='add-to-order' to the Add-to-Order button in the food details dialog
notes: Stripe TEST MODE (sk_test_emergent). Session URL host is checkout.stripe.com as required. We did not complete payment via the hosted UI; per instructions only redirect + open/unpaid status was verified. Status endpoint never marked the order paid for an unpaid session, confirming idempotent guard.
